title: Delicate Russian Almond Fritters
description: A light, springy snack that blends almond flour and aromatic spices, perfect for a sick day.
instructions: In a bowl, whisk almond flour, sea salt, turmeric, cardamom, ginger, and lemon zest until well combined.
Add warm water and apple cider vinegar to the dry mix, stirring until a smooth batter forms.
Fold in maple syrup, ensuring the batter is slightly thick but pourable.
Heat olive oil in a nonstick skillet over medium heat until shimmering.
Drop spoonfuls of batter into the hot oil, forming small fritters about 2 inches wide.
Cook each fritter for 3 minutes on the first side until golden brown and bubbles form on the surface.
Flip the fritters and cook for an additional 2 minutes on the other side until crisp.
Transfer finished fritters to a paper towel lined plate to drain excess oil.
Serve warm, optionally dusted with a pinch of fresh ground pepper or lightly drizzled with lime juice.
